name: Tab Complete
desc: Player presses Tab in chat to request auto-completion. Sends the partial message or command.

fields.name: hasTargetBlock
fields.desc: Whether the cursor is over a block

fields.name: targetBlock
fields.desc: Block position the cursor is over

encoding: Whether cursor is over a block
notes: The server responds with S3APacketTabComplete containing matching commands/player names. The optional BlockPos allows for block-sensitive completions (e.g., filling /give with block IDs of looked-at block).

modules.name: AntiTabComplete
modules.purpose: Cancel tab-complete requests to hide commands from server logs.
